title: lastrea dilatata
intro: Lastrea dilatata, also known as the dilated lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Athyriaceae, characterized by its delicate fronds and unique leaf structure. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Lastrea dilatata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through decoction, infusion, or tincture, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization in various health applications.
